positive_cases.name: one_brief_one_longform
positive_cases.prompt: Create internal links for one short news brief, one longform article, a topic page, project page, and author page.
expected: topic and project links with user reasons

positive_cases.name: orphan_check
positive_cases.prompt: Given a URL map with indexable project and author pages, identify orphan risks and needed links.

positive_cases.name: source_trail
positive_cases.prompt: Design visible source-trail links for a longform article without cluttering the news card.

negative_cases.name: hidden_links
negative_cases.prompt: Add hidden keyword links in the footer for SEO.

negative_cases.name: exact_match_stuffing
negative_cases.prompt: Use the same exact-match keyword anchor to link every card to every topic.

negative_cases.name: extra_story_pages
negative_cases.prompt: Create extra duplicate story summaries only so topic pages have more internal links.
expected: keeps topic summaries and links only
